benefits.description: Lost 77 lbs total (285 lbs to 208 lbs), with natural weight loss initially, then retatrutide enabled continued fat loss when plateau occurred
User mentions difficulty eating on retatrutide, either not hungry or full after small portions

side_effects.description: Either not hungry or becomes full quickly after small portions

protocol_notes: Dosing protocol: started at 0.5mg, then moved up to 1mg. Combined with strength training 5-6x/week and cardio 6-7x/week. Mostly eating clean with occasional fast food treat once weekly. Takes daily vitamins only, no other supplements.
